summary: Iteration 32 - Tracking & Status Intelligence Layer testing. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend TrackingCard component verified with all data-testid attributes working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Tracking endpoints (POST /tracking, GET /tracking, POST /tracking/verify) all working correctly
Workspace endpoint returns complete tracking intelligence block with all required fields
Proof upload auto-populates tracking when reference_code is provided
TrackingCard component renders correctly with all data-testid attributes
Mini timeline shows correct milestone progression
Verification history is properly tracked and displayed
seed_data_creation: First practice (d9c4fca6-a27d-4f97-a006-d191505549f9) has tracking data with protocol_number 2026-PROT-00451 and verified state
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 32 tested Tracking & Status Intelligence Layer. All tests passed. Key verified: (1) GET /api/practices/{id}/workspace returns tracking block with has_reference, tracked_state, tracked_state_label, entity_name, status_explanation, next_expected_step, mini_timeline. (2) POST /api/practices/{id}/tracking adds tracking reference with identifier_type and identifier_value. (3) POST /api/practices/{id}/tracking/verify verifies tracking with verification_outcome and entity_state. (4) GET /api/practices/{id}/tracking returns full tracking intelligence. (5) POST /api/practices/{id}/proof auto-populates tracking when reference_code provided. (6) TrackingCard renders with data-testid='tracking-card'. (7) All tracking UI elements have correct data-testid: tracking-state-label, tracking-explanation, tracking-reference-value, copy-reference-btn, tracking-verification-block, tracking-entity-block, tracking-next-step, tracking-mini-timeline. (8) tracking-prompt-block and add-tracking-reference-btn only appear for post-submission practices without reference. (9) Tracking dialog has tracking-type-select, tracking-value-input, confirm-tracking-btn.

details: GET /api/practices/{id}/workspace returns tracking intelligence block with all required fields
Practice d9c4fca6 has protocol_number 2026-PROT-00451 with verified state
Practices without reference show not_available state
Mini timeline has milestones with key, label, status (done/current/pending)
Entity name and state from catalog displayed correctly
POST /api/practices/{id}/tracking adds reference with identifier_type and identifier_value
pec_delivery proof maps to pec_reference tracking type
All 7 identifier types work: domus_number, protocol_number, practice_number, pec_reference, receipt_code, submission_reference, payment_reference
